# bitnet-log

Tracking 1-bit inference viability for personally-owned hardware.

## Structured Data

- data/weights.jsonl — 5 weight compression milestones (BitNet b1.58 → 100B target)
- data/runs.jsonl — 10 performance claims with verification status
- data/viability.tsv — 3 gates: weight, cache, convergence

## Query Examples

Verified performance claims:
  jq 'select(.verified==true)' data/runs.jsonl

Open gates:
  awk -F'\t' '$2!="closed"' data/viability.tsv

## Source

Full analysis in README.md.
